function.outcome_justification: Using today from context (2026-03-30), birthday search across 10_entities/cast showed upcoming birthdays; the nearest date after today is 05-21, and the canonical file 10_entities/cast/tobias.md confirms the exact name Tobias Kern with birthday 1986-05-21. No matching tie on that date appeared in the birthday search results.
